records.question: Which players named Don were born in Baton Rouge and attended high school in LA?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.birthcity = 'Baton Rouge' AND players.usefirst = 'Don' AND players.hsstate = 'LA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT playerID
FROM players
WHERE (firstName = 'Don' OR useFirst = 'Don')
  AND birthCity = 'Baton Rouge'
  AND hsState = 'LA'

records.question: Who are the players born in Brooklyn, with both their birth country and high school country as USA, who attended Providence and had exactly 3 free throw attempts, 6 assists, and played 16 minutes in the All-Star game?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE players.hscountry = 'USA' AND players.birthcity = 'Brooklyn' AND player_allstar.ft_attempted = 3.0 AND player_allstar.assists = 6.0 AND player_allstar.minutes = 16 AND players.birthcountry = 'USA' AND players.college = 'Providence'

SELECT players.playerID
FROM players
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerID = player_allstar.playerID
WHERE players.birthCity = 'Brooklyn'
  AND players.birthCountry = 'USA'
  AND players.hsCountry = 'USA'
  AND players.college = 'Providence'
  AND player_allstar.ft_attempted = 3
  AND player_allstar.assists = 6
  AND player_allstar.minutes = 16

records.question: Who are the players from Miami (FL) college with at most 2.0 defensive rebounds in all-star games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE player_allstar.d_rebounds <= 2.0 AND players.college = 'Miami (FL)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT players.playerID
FROM players
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerID = player_allstar.playerID
WHERE players.college = 'Miami (FL)'
GROUP BY players.playerID
HAVING MAX(COALESCE(player_allstar.d_rebounds, 0)) <= 2.0

records.question: Who are the players born on or before 1947-04-16 with awards from 1976 or later, who played at most 1 all-star game making no more than 5 free throws and attempting no more than 17 field goals?

JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid

GROUP BY players.playerID
HAVING COUNT(player_allstar.season_id) <= 1
   AND COALESCE(SUM(player_allstar.ft_made), 0) <= 5
   AND COALESCE(SUM(player_allstar.fg_attempted), 0) <= 17

JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.birthdate >= '1963-01-21' AND players.lastseason = 0.0 AND players.pos = 'F-C' AND players.highschool = 'Centralia' AND awards_players.year >= 1991 AND players.usefirst = 'Detlef'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT players.playerID
FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerID = awards_players.playerID
WHERE players.firstName = 'Detlef'
  AND players.birthDate >= '1963-01-21'
  AND players.pos = 'F-C'
  AND players.highSchool = 'Centralia'
  AND players.lastseason = 0.0
  AND awards_players.year >= 1991

records.question: What players were born in New York, attended Southside High School in Rockville Centre, went to St. John's (NY), have race W, birth state NY, and played at least from season 0.0 through their last season?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.birthcity = 'New York' AND players.college = 'St. John''s (NY)' AND players.lastseason >= 0.0 AND players.race = 'W' AND players.birthstate = 'NY' AND players.highschool = 'Southside' AND players.firstseason >= 0.0 AND players.hscity = 'Rockville Centre'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT playerID
FROM players
WHERE birthCity = 'New York'
  AND highSchool = 'Southside'
  AND hsCity = 'Rockville Centre'
  AND college = "St. John's (NY)"
  AND race = 'W'
  AND birthState = 'NY'
  AND (firstseason IS NULL OR firstseason <= 0)
  AND (lastseason IS NULL OR lastseason >= 0)

records.question: Which players nicknamed Rick, born in the USA, who attended Miami (FL), started their first season at least 0.0, and died on or before 0000-00-00 have received awards?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
WHERE players.deathdate <= '0000-00-00' AND players.firstseason >= 0.0 AND players.college = 'Miami (FL)' AND players.namenick = 'Rick' AND players.birthcountry = 'USA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT players.playerID
FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerID = awards_players.playerID
WHERE players.nameNick = 'Rick'
  AND players.birthCountry = 'USA'
  AND players.college = 'Miami (FL)'
  AND players.firstseason >= 0.0
  AND players.deathDate <= '0000-00-00'

records.question: Who are the guards born in CA that have played in the NBA and averaged at least 1.0 assist in All-Star games?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE awards_players.lgid = 'NBA' AND player_allstar.assists >= 1.0 AND players.pos = 'G' AND players.birthstate = 'CA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT players.playerID
FROM players
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerID = player_allstar.playerID
WHERE players.pos LIKE '%G%'
  AND players.birthState = 'CA'
  AND player_allstar.assists * 1.0 / NULLIF(player_allstar.games_played, 0) >= 1.0
  AND player_allstar.league_id = 'NBA'

records.question: Which players born in OH have received awards and been selected as all-stars?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerid = awards_players.playerid
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerid = player_allstar.playerid
WHERE players.birthstate = 'OH'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT players.playerID
FROM players
JOIN awards_players ON players.playerID = awards_players.playerID
JOIN player_allstar ON players.playerID = player_allstar.playerID
WHERE players.birthState = 'OH'
GROUP BY players.playerID

records.question: Which players named Demetrius Battie, nicknamed Tony, born in the USA, with race B, who play the C-F position and died on or after 0000-00-00?

SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.birthcountry = 'USA' AND players.namenick = 'Tony' AND players.pos = 'C-F' AND players.deathdate >= '0000-00-00' AND players.firstname = 'Demetrius' AND players.lastname = 'Battie' AND players.race = 'B'

FROM players
WHERE firstName = 'Demetrius'
  AND lastName = 'Battie'
  AND nameNick = 'Tony'
  AND birthCountry = 'USA'
  AND race = 'B'
  AND pos = 'C-F'
  AND (deathDate >= '0000-00-00' OR deathDate IS NULL)

records.question: Which players born in the USA, who started their first season at 0.0, have high school roots in South Carolina and the USA, are still alive, and have won the All-NBA Second Team award?

SELECT players.playerid FROM players

WHERE players.hsstate = 'SC' AND players.hscountry = 'USA' AND players.firstseason = 0.0 AND awards_players.award = 'All-NBA Second Team' AND players.deathdate = '0000-00-00' AND players.birthcountry = 'USA'

  AND players.hsState = 'SC'
  AND players.hsCountry = 'USA'
  AND players.deathDate IS NULL

records.question: Which players have the last name Harper, are race B, started no later than season 0.0, and went to Kiser High School in Dayton, were born in Dayton, and attended Miami (OH) college?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT players.playerid FROM players
WHERE players.race = 'B' AND players.firstseason <= 0.0 AND players.highschool = 'Kiser' AND players.hscity = 'Dayton' AND players.lastname = 'Harper' AND players.college = 'Miami (OH)' AND players.birthcity = 'Dayton'

  AND hsCity = 'Dayton'
  AND birthCity = 'Dayton'
  AND college = 'Miami (OH)'
